title: Chapter 7 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 7 concepts!

questions.question: The `extends` keyword is associated with which pillar of OOP?
questions.explanation: Extends allows a subclass to inherit the variables and methods of a parent blueprint.

questions.question: A function defined inside a class is officially called a:
questions.explanation: Functions living internally inside a class scope are Methods.

questions.question: A constructor function must share the exact identical name as the Class it resides in.
questions.explanation: Dart requires constructor methods to syntactically match the precise Class name.
